PLAN_DEVIATIONS_DISCOVERED_TASK_7:
  1. **Task 7 governance content is large enough that single-Sonnet dispatch via /tmp payload exceeds Sonnet's effective working budget.** The first consolidated dispatch attempt (Dispatch S0) thrashed at 4 tool uses with 0 Edits landed. Re-decomposition into one Sonnet per file (S1-S5) succeeded. This is the 2nd Yelli data point confirming V32.1 §1 Operational Note "Sonnet baseline overhead ~30-50K + complex tool-call params ≤ ~80-100K total before thrash risk."
  2. **agent-log.md narrative is large enough to be its own thrash risk even at one-Edit-only dispatch.** S5 thrashed at 7 tool uses while writing one long paragraph (likely the prompt + Edit params + system overhead summed past Sonnet's compaction window). Recovery via a focused correction dispatch (S6) replaced the hallucinated content with correct wiki-link IDs. **Carry to lessons.md as 🟤 [[agent-log-bulky-paragraph-thrash]]** for the NEXT close-out — pre-split bulky agent-log paragraphs into multiple smaller Edits.
